title: In-app open-source attributions projection
description: Runtime-only projection of the dependency tree produced by scripts/oss-generate.mjs. Consumed by js/licenses.js to render the Open-Source Licenses page (licenses.html). Generated alongside sbom.json from the same dataset — see data-model.md 'Cross-file invariants'.

generatedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of the generator invocation. MUST equal the CycloneDX metadata.timestamp in the sibling sbom.json (invariant 4).

appVersion.description: App version at generation time (read from version.json if present, else 'dev').

entries.description: Runtime open-source libraries shipped in the build. Sorted alphabetically by name (case-insensitive); ties broken by version ascending.

license.description: SPDX identifier, SPDX expression (verbatim), or the string 'UNKNOWN' if no license could be determined.

copyright.description: Upstream-published copyright line. Omitted from the UI when null.

supplier.description: Source channel. The UI does not visually distinguish suppliers (FR-002 acceptance scenario 3), but the field is preserved for debuggability.
